description: Any unit completely destroyed in battle must roll D6 on this table. Units remaining on table at battle end recover completely.

results.name: Lost
results.description: The unit is lost in action or captured. Remove from roster. Can be replaced with a new unit for 1 CP.

results.name: Devastated
results.description: The unit has suffered extensive damage or losses. Unusable for two campaign battles.

results.name: Weakened
results.description: Individual recovers fine. Squad/weapon team deploys with one fewer figure until it sits out a battle. Vehicle deploys with -1 KP until left out of battle.

results.name: Okay
results.description: The unit is okay. Individual survived with minor wounds, vehicle crew bailed out and reassigned, squad replaces losses and integrates quickly.
